reviewReply.comment: Hola German, gracias por tu calificacion. Saludos YPF

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar... La fila de autos era bastante larga

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place... The line of cars was quite long

reviews.comment:
Te atienden de mala gana,como si te estuvieran haciendo un favor, limpian el lugar en horario de merienda,por lo tanto tenés que llevarte tu merienda y tomarla afuera,pésima atención al publico

(Translated by Google)
They serve you reluctantly, as if they were doing you a favor; they clean the place during lunchtime, so you have to bring your own snack and eat it outside; terrible customer service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15910782450970095927/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHN01ycGZREAE

reviews.comment:
Baño sucio(en ese momento) puerta de entrada rota. Y no recibieron tarjeta debito viaje( nuevas) del banco nacion, cuando el aca, anterior si la recibio

(Translated by Google)
Dirty bathroom (at that time), broken front door. And they didn't receive the new travel debit card from Banco Nación, even though the previous one did.
